creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 238099
Patch for libpaper

Update URLs to new location
Enable "make test" (mandree helped debugging this)

Upstream refers to git log as "Changelog"

Compile and runtime tested on FreeBSD 13.1-STABLE #0 stable/13-n252834-a7766860e0f (amd64) (make, make test, make check-plist)
Poudriere testport OK 12.3-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 13.1-RELEASE (i386)

Compile tested with following consumers using Poudriere bulk on 12.3-RELEASE (amd64):
editors/ted
games/tuxpaint
games/tuxpaint-config
graphics/kooka
japanese/ja-tex-xdvik
print/a2ps
print/c2ps
print/cups
print/ghostscript8-base
print/ghostscript9-agpl-base
print/ghostscript9-agpl-x11
print/ghostscript9-base
print/lprps
print/papersize-default-a4
print/papersize-default-letter
print/psutils
print/tex-dvipdfmx
print/tex-dvipsk
print/tex-xdvik
